articles.title: Unity Muse AI Tools Now Available for General Access
articles.summary: Unity has announced general availability of Unity Muse, their AI-powered creation suite. The toolset includes Muse Sprite for 2D asset generation, Muse Texture for materials, and Muse Chat for documentation assistance.

articles.title: NVIDIA Releases DLSS 3.5 with Ray Reconstruction
articles.summary: NVIDIA's latest DLSS 3.5 introduces Ray Reconstruction, an AI-powered technique that enhances ray-traced image quality while maintaining performance. The technology is being integrated into Unreal Engine 5.4.

articles.title: AI-Powered Procedural Dungeon Generation Tools Compared
articles.summary: A comprehensive comparison of AI-driven procedural generation tools for dungeon creation, including Dungeon Alchemist, AI Dungeon Generator, and custom GPT-based solutions.

articles.title: GitHub Copilot X: New Features for Game Development
articles.summary: GitHub Copilot X introduces specialized support for game development workflows, including shader code generation, Unity/Unreal Engine API suggestions, and improved context awareness for game logic.

articles.title: AI Audio Tools for Indie Game Developers: 2025 Guide
articles.summary: A curated list of AI audio generation tools suitable for indie developers, covering sound effects (ElevenLabs, Stable Audio), music generation (Suno, Udio), and voice synthesis options.
